chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI SCRA Nos. 730 & 732 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of Main Case. 08.05.2025. Mr. Iqbal M. Khurram, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Muhammad Siddique, Advocate. ________________ Counsel for the Applicant submits that brief has been returned to the Department, whereas, no other counsel has been engaged by the Department. In view of such position, since this matter is pending since 2014, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Office to place copy of this order in connected SCRA. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Nasir/
